channel.title: pmos.md
channel.description: Weekly signal for AI-era product managers. Repos, articles, and curated reads. Built by a PM, for PMs.

item.title: Week of Apr 14, 2026 — Signal
item.description:
This week's signal

Articles

  • How the best PMs are using AI agents in their actual workflows — Lenny's Newsletter
  • The death of the generalist PM and what replaces it — Reforge
  • LNO prioritization in an AI-first world — Shreyas Doshi
  • I built an open-source user interview synthesizer for PMs — HN Show HN

New repos

  • claude-pm-kit — CLAUDE.md templates and MCP configs for PM workflows
